title: Kolkata, West Bengal — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kolkata, West Bengal: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kolkata is a city in West Bengal with a population of 14,850,000. The cultural capital of India, known for its colonial architecture, literary heritage, delicious street food, and passionate football culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
